message:
🐛 Fix pin button state not syncing across KeepAlive navigation (#1781)

KeepAlive keeps dashboard components mounted when navigating away.
The pin checkbox useEffect fired on every location.pathname change,
including paths belonging to other dashboards. Fix by capturing the
dashboard's own path on mount via useRef and only syncing pin state
when location.pathname matches the component's own path.

Fixes #1743

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
